hero.subheadline: Real Auburn crew. Real equipment. Real results you can walk on.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Everything Your Yard Needs
services_section.subheading: From stone work to sprinkler systems

services.title: Stone Pavers & Hardscaping
services.description: Patios, walkways, and borders that complement your space. Professional installation around synthetic turf and existing features.

services.title: Irrigation Systems
services.description: Complete sprinkler installation and repair services. We fix what others break and maintain what we install.

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Regular mowing, edging, and seasonal cleanup to keep your property looking sharp year-round.

services.title: Landscape Design
services.description: Custom planning and installation to transform your outdoor space. Native plants and practical solutions.

about.heading: Auburn Landscape Crew
about.body: We're an Auburn landscape team that shows up when we say we will. Stone work, irrigation, and everything in between.

reviews.name: Mark F.
reviews.text: Just finished stone pavers around our synthetic turf patio. The crew protected our lawn mower with a perfect border between yard and turf.

reviews.name: Steven W.
reviews.text: They installed our irrigation system and came back to fix damage from a gas company contractor. Dylan took care of everything professionally.

reviews.name: Jackie W.
reviews.text: Excellent service and communication! Very affordable and nice people. Highly recommended!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Auburn & Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Full landscape services throughout Lee County

cta.heading: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.body: Free estimates on stone work, irrigation, and complete landscape services. Local crew, honest pricing.
